chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 507 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.05.2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for Respondents No.2 to 4/HESCO Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents No.5 to 10/SEPCO Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for respondents No.2 to 4/HESCO is present, submits that they are not necessary party in this petition, as the issue pertains to Respondents No.5 to 10/SEPCO, therefore, they will not file any comments. Learned counsel for Respondents No.5 to 10/SEPCO submits that application filed by the petitioner in compliance of order of Federal Ombudsman dated 14.02.2009 is in process and will be decided within a period of two months. Accordingly, with consent, this petition, in view of above, is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
